source_rationale: Taking the three-gene motif of GATA1, FLI1, and KLF1 within the core hematopoiesis network (Qiu et al. 2022)(Krumsiek et al. 2011)(Qiu et al. 2022) (Fig. 3c and d) as an example, Tabula accurately predicts both the expression dynamics over iterations (Fig. 3c) and distribution shifts pre- and post-perturbation on either activation or repression regulations (Fig. 3d).

source_rationale: The table (top left) lists four CR rules, where multiple regulators work in concert to regulate the expression of FGF8, GATA4, and ISL1 through specific combinatorial regulatory logic.
The right subpanel illustrates how Tabula determines combinatorial regulation using the example of the combinatorial regulation from GATA1 and FLI-1 to EKLF.
